hero.title: Welcome to robinsoft
hero.p1: We are the robinsoft development team, focusing on multimedia and cloud solutions. Our current product includes CloudMediaPlayer, and more products will be released.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.p: Build simple, reliable and creative software to help users better manage and play multimedia content.

products.title: Products - robinsoft
products.heading: Our products
products.moreDesc: We are developing more products that make life better.

cmp.title: CloudMediaPlayer
cmp.p: CloudMediaPlayer is a cloud-based media player and manager that supports streaming, playlist management and cross-device sync.

cmpDetail.slogan: Cloud-based media playback and management for modern users.
cmpDetail.intro1: CloudMediaPlayer is the flagship product of robinsoft. It brings together media playback, playlist management, and cross-device access in a single streamlined experience.
cmpDetail.intro2: This page follows the same banner, typography, and layout style as the rest of the site, and provides quick access to the related Google Sites pages below.
cmpDetail.audiences: Multi-generational families and adult children sharing life with elderly parents; small business owners using screens for digital signage; and eco-conscious home decorators repurposing old devices as digital frames to enhance their living environment.
cmpDetail.value1: CloudMediaPlayer breathes life into old devices by optimizing performance for low-end hardware.
cmpDetail.value2: It creates value through multi-cloud photo aggregation, turning unused tablets into dynamic family hubs. Adhering to Google Play quality standards, it offers a stable, efficient, and purposeful UX.

about.title: About robinsoft
about.heading: About us
about.p: robinsoft is a development team focused on multimedia and cloud services. Our goal is to deliver stable, simple and powerful applications to users.
